name: Savory Baked Apple with Port Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté shallots in butter until translucent.
2. Crumble pork and veal into the skillet and sauté until browned.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Add brandy, thyme, salt, and pepper to the skillet and cook until alcohol has evaporated.
5. Cut a 1-inch cap from the top of each apple; reserve caps.
6. Using a melon baller, hollow out the core and some of the flesh of the apples.
7. Fill each cavity with one-fourth of the meat mixture and top with a spinach leaf.
8. Replace caps on the apples and arrange them in a shallow baking pan.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 20 to 30 minutes, or until apples are tender yet firm enough to hold their shape.
10. Spoon a pool of Port Wine Sauce onto individual serving plates.
11. Top with apples and serve.
